tools.name: prod.acceptInputDeviceTransfer
tools.description: Accept an incoming input device transfer. The ownership of the device will transfer to your AWS account.

tools.name: prod.batchDelete
tools.description: Starts delete of resources.

tools.name: prod.batchStart
tools.description: Starts existing resources

tools.name: prod.batchStop
tools.description: Stops running resources

tools.name: prod.batchUpdateSchedule
tools.description: Update a channel schedule

tools.name: prod.cancelInputDeviceTransfer
tools.description: Cancel an input device transfer that you have requested.

tools.name: prod.claimDevice
tools.description: Send a request to claim an AWS Elemental device that you have purchased from a third-party vendor. After the request succeeds, you will own the device.

tools.name: prod.createChannel
tools.description: Creates a new channel

tools.name: prod.createInput
tools.description: Create an input

tools.name: prod.createInputSecurityGroup
tools.description: Creates a Input Security Group

tools.name: prod.createMultiplex
tools.description: Create a new multiplex.

tools.name: prod.createMultiplexProgram
tools.description: Create a new program in the multiplex.

tools.name: prod.createPartnerInput
tools.description: Create a partner input

tools.name: prod.createTags
tools.description: Create tags for a resource

tools.name: prod.deleteChannel
tools.description: Starts deletion of channel. The associated outputs are also deleted.

tools.name: prod.deleteInput
tools.description: Deletes the input end point

tools.name: prod.deleteInputSecurityGroup
tools.description: Deletes an Input Security Group

tools.name: prod.deleteMultiplex
tools.description: Delete a multiplex. The multiplex must be idle.

tools.name: prod.deleteMultiplexProgram
tools.description: Delete a program from a multiplex.

tools.name: prod.deleteReservation
tools.description: Delete an expired reservation.

tools.name: prod.deleteSchedule
tools.description: Delete all schedule actions on a channel.

tools.name: prod.deleteTags
tools.description: Removes tags for a resource

tools.name: prod.describeChannel
tools.description: Gets details about a channel

tools.name: prod.describeInput
tools.description: Produces details about an input

tools.name: prod.describeInputDevice
tools.description: Gets the details for the input device

tools.name: prod.describeInputDeviceThumbnail
tools.description: Get the latest thumbnail data for the input device.

tools.name: prod.describeInputSecurityGroup
tools.description: Produces a summary of an Input Security Group

tools.name: prod.describeMultiplex
tools.description: Gets details about a multiplex.

tools.name: prod.describeMultiplexProgram
tools.description: Get the details for a program in a multiplex.

tools.name: prod.describeOffering
tools.description: Get details for an offering.

tools.name: prod.describeReservation
tools.description: Get details for a reservation.

tools.name: prod.describeSchedule
tools.description: Get a channel schedule

tools.name: prod.listChannels
tools.description: Produces list of channels that have been created

tools.name: prod.listInputDevices
tools.description: List input devices

tools.name: prod.listInputDeviceTransfers
tools.description: List input devices that are currently being transferred. List input devices that you are transferring from your AWS account or input devices that another AWS account is transferring to you.

tools.name: prod.listInputs
tools.description: Produces list of inputs that have been created

tools.name: prod.listInputSecurityGroups
tools.description: Produces a list of Input Security Groups for an account

tools.name: prod.listMultiplexes
tools.description: Retrieve a list of the existing multiplexes.

tools.name: prod.listMultiplexPrograms
tools.description: List the programs that currently exist for a specific multiplex.

tools.name: prod.listOfferings
tools.description: List offerings available for purchase.

tools.name: prod.listReservations
tools.description: List purchased reservations.

tools.name: prod.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Produces list of tags that have been created for a resource

tools.name: prod.purchaseOffering
tools.description: Purchase an offering and create a reservation.

tools.name: prod.rebootInputDevice
tools.description: Send a reboot command to the specified input device. The device will begin rebooting within a few seconds of sending the command. When the reboot is complete, the device’s connection status will change to connected.

tools.name: prod.rejectInputDeviceTransfer
tools.description: Reject the transfer of the specified input device to your AWS account.

tools.name: prod.startChannel
tools.description: Starts an existing channel

tools.name: prod.startInputDeviceMaintenanceWindow
tools.description: Start a maintenance window for the specified input device. Starting a maintenance window will give the device up to two hours to install software. If the device was streaming prior to the maintenance, it will resume streaming when the software is fully installed. Devices automatically install updates while they are powered on and their MediaLive channels are stopped. A maintenance window allows you to update a device without having to stop MediaLive channels that use the device. The device must remain powered on and connected to the internet for the duration of the maintenance.

tools.name: prod.startMultiplex
tools.description: Start (run) the multiplex. Starting the multiplex does not start the channels. You must explicitly start each channel.

tools.name: prod.stopChannel
tools.description: Stops a running channel

tools.name: prod.stopMultiplex
tools.description: Stops a running multiplex. If the multiplex isn't running, this action has no effect.

tools.name: prod.transferInputDevice
tools.description: Start an input device transfer to another AWS account. After you make the request, the other account must accept or reject the transfer.

tools.name: prod.updateChannel
tools.description: Updates a channel.

tools.name: prod.updateChannelClass
tools.description: Changes the class of the channel.

tools.name: prod.updateInput
tools.description: Updates an input.

tools.name: prod.updateInputDevice
tools.description: Updates the parameters for the input device.

tools.name: prod.updateInputSecurityGroup
tools.description: Update an Input Security Group's Whilelists.

tools.name: prod.updateMultiplex
tools.description: Updates a multiplex.

tools.name: prod.updateMultiplexProgram
tools.description: Update a program in a multiplex.

tools.name: prod.updateReservation
tools.description: Update reservation.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
